species: N2O-reducing enrichment culture (activated-sludge-derived mixed community; nosZ clade II increased at low D)

growth_records.strain: Chemostat enrichment (inocula: Harnaschpolder and Dokhaven WWTP activated sludge)
growth_records.medium: Mineral medium with acetate + N2O (Period III, acetate-limited, low D)
growth_records.cite: Conthe et al. Life on N2O: deciphering the ecophysiology of N2O respiring bacterial communities in a continuous culture. The ISME Journal (2018). DOI:10.1038/s41396-018-0063-7. [PMC5864245]
growth_records.snippet: Period III | Acetate | D=0.028 | CH3COO- -2.54 | N2O -7.78 | N2 7.49 | NH4+ -0.32 | biomass 1.26 | CO2 3.35 (Table 2). YXAc 0.25, YXN2O 0.16 (Table 3).
growth_records.notes: mu=D=0.028; td=ln2/0.028=24.75 h. biomass(Cmol)=1.26/0.028=0.045 Cmol; gDW=*24.6=1.107 g. Specific rate=Table2 mmol/h /1.107 gDW. Mixed community. C-bal 92%, e- bal 101%.
